question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/transaction/Transaction.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Field: payerAccountId] Can an unprivileged external user submit a transaction with a null payerAccountId, causing toTransactionHash() to call payerAccountId.getId() and throw a NullPointerException that aborts the transaction hash persistence step, leaving the transaction record without a corresponding hash index entry?
